content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月09日 周二
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [JimLiu/baoyu-design](https://github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-design)
   Run Claude Design locally as an Agent Skill — Cursor, Claude Code & more. Produc | ⭐515
2. [amElnagdy/guard-skills](https://github.com/amElnagdy/guard-skills)
   Guard skills for coding agents, quality gates that catch AI-generated failure mo | ⭐467
3. [GordenSun/GordenSuperPPTSkills](https://github.com/GordenSun/GordenSuperPPTSkills)
   AI PPT赛道终结者，史上最最最强 PPT Skill！！！  使用GPT生成豪华的图片格式PPT，然后转换为完全可编辑的PPTX文件。 | ⭐383
4. [CWS6206/ai-coding-starter-kit](https://github.com/CWS6206/ai-coding-starter-kit)
   Kuratierte Agent Skills, Checklisten, Templates und Leitfäden für Schweizer Entw | ⭐262
5. [FerroxLabs/wayland](https://github.com/FerroxLabs/wayland)
   Wayland - The AI Agent That Perceives. Reasons. Acts. Evolves. | ⭐247
6. [adamallcock/codex-chatgpt-control](https://github.com/adamallcock/codex-chatgpt-control)
   Unofficial SDK for Codex agents controlling visible ChatGPT web sessions | ⭐153
7. [zengxiao-he/tessera](https://github.com/zengxiao-he/tessera)
   From teacher to tiles — a from-scratch LLM distillation & serving engine: custom | ⭐68
8. [xqnode/claude-code-helper](https://github.com/xqnode/claude-code-helper)
   Windows tray proxy: route Claude Code desktop (Code + Cowork) to DeepSeek, Qwen, | ⭐51

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
